warm_spring.description: Warm undertone, light to medium depth, high clarity

cool_summer.description: Cool undertone, light to medium depth, muted/soft

warm_autumn.description: Warm undertone, medium to deep depth, muted/rich

cool_winter.description: Cool undertone, deep or very light depth, high contrast/clarity

color_harmonies.complementary: Colors opposite on the color wheel (e.g. blue + orange)
color_harmonies.analogous: Colors adjacent on the color wheel (e.g. blue + blue-green + green)
color_harmonies.triadic: Three colors evenly spaced on the wheel (e.g. red + yellow + blue)
color_harmonies.split_complementary: A color + two colors adjacent to its complement

overcast.recommendation: Choose more saturated colors to compensate

bright_sun.description: Direct light, colors appear washed out or overly vivid

golden_hour.recommendation: Warm tones look especially good; cool tones may shift

indoor_artificial.description: Varies by light source (warm incandescent vs cool fluorescent)
indoor_artificial.recommendation: Neutral palette works across most indoor lighting
